mapper.select: SELECT id, seq_name, prefix, sequence, code_length, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, remark, version FROM mdm_sequence WHERE deleted = 0 AND seq_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{seqName}, '%') AND prefix LIKE CONCAT('%', #{prefix}, '%') ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT seq_name, prefix, sequence, code_length, version FROM mdm_sequence WHERE deleted = 0 AND prefix = #{prefix}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mdm_sequence ( seq_name, prefix, sequence, code_length ) VALUES ( #{seqName}, #{prefix}, #{sequence}, #{codeLength} )
mapper.update: UPDATE mdm_sequence SET sequence = #{sequence}, version = version + 1 WHERE deleted = 0 AND prefix = #{prefix} AND version = #{version}
